content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "從車站到咖啡店",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "請問，從車站到咖啡店怎麼走？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐngwèn, cóng chēzhàn dào kāfēidiàn zěnme zǒu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "qing3 wen4, cong2 che1 zhan4 dao4 ka1 fei1 dian4 zen3 me zou3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get from the station to the coffee shop?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 역에서 커피숍까지 어떻게 가나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你一直走，到路口左轉，咖啡店在對面。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yīzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, kāfēidiàn zài duìmiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 yi1 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4 kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, ka1 fei1 dian4 zai4 dui4 mian4.",
          "translation_en": "Go straight, turn left at the intersection, and the coffee shop is across the street.",
          "translation_ko": "계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 좌회전하시면, 커피숍이 맞은편에 있습니다."
        },
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "謝謝你。我想買一杯咖啡，多少錢？",
        "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī bēi kāfēi, duōshao qián?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5 ni3. Wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi1 bei1 ka1 fei1, duo1 shao5 qian2?",
        "translation_en": "Thank you. I'd like to buy a cup of coffee, how much is it?",
        "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 커피 한 잔 사고 싶은데, 얼마인가요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "小杯的五十塊，中杯的六十塊。你要哪一種？",
        "pinyin": "Xiǎo bēi de wǔshí kuài, zhōng bēi de liùshí kuài. Nǐ yào nǎ yī zhǒng?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "xiao3 bei1 de5 wu3 shi2 kuai4, zhong1 bei1 de5 liu4 shi2 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 na3 yi1 zhong3?",
        "translation_en": "Small is 50 dollars, medium is 60 dollars. Which one would you like?",
        "translation_ko": "작은 컵은 50원, 중간 컵은 60원입니다. 어떤 걸로 하시겠어요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "我要中杯的，少冰。這是六十塊，不用找錢。",
        "pinyin": "Wǒ yào zhōng bēi de, shǎo bīng. Zhè shì liùshí kuài, bùyòng zhǎo qián.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 yao4 zhong1 bei1 de5, shao3 bing1. Zhe4 shi4 liu4 shi2 kuai4, bu4 yong4 zhao3 qian2.",
        "translation_en": "I'll take a medium, less ice. Here's 60 dollars, keep the change.",
        "translation_ko": "중간 컵으로 할게요, 얼음 적게 넣어 주세요. 여기 60원입니다, 거스름돈은 괜찮아요."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "謝謝。你住在附近嗎？",
        "pinyin": "Xièxie. Nǐ zhù zài fùjìn ma?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5. Ni3 zhu4 zai4 fu4 jin4 ma?",
        "translation_en": "Thank you. Do you live nearby?",
        "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 근처에 사시나요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "對，我剛搬來這裡。我想認識新朋友。",
        "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ gāng bān lái zhèlǐ. Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 gang1 ban1 lai2 zhe4 li3. Wo3 xiang3 ren4 shi5 xin1 peng2 you5.",
        "translation_en": "Yes, I just moved here. I'd like to make new friends.",
        "translation_ko": "네, 방금 이사 왔어요. 새로운 친구를 사귀고 싶어요."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "太好了！我們可以一起聊天。",
        "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le! Wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ liáotiān.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "tai4 hao3 le5! Wo3 men5 ke3 yi3 yi1 qi3 liao2 tian1.",
        "translation_en": "Great! We can chat together.",
        "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요! 같이 이야기할 수 있어요."
      }
    ],
    "comprehension_questions": [
      {
        "question_en": "Where is the coffee shop?",
        "question_ko": "커피숍은 어디에 있습니까?",
        "options_en": ["At the station", "Across the street from the intersection", "Next to the station"],
        "options_ko": ["역에", "교차로 맞은편에", "역 옆에"],
        "correct_index": 1
      }
    ],
    "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
    "free_response_prompt": "Describe how you would ask for directions to a cafe from a station in Chinese."
  },
  {
    "title": "走錯地方，找人修理",
    "turns": [
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "不好意思，我好像走錯了。這裡是修理店嗎？",
        "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ hǎoxiàng zǒu cuò le. Zhèlǐ shì xiūlǐ diàn ma?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 hao3 xiang4 zou3 cuo4 le5. Zhe4 li3 shi4 xiu1 li3 dian4 ma?",
        "translation_en": "Excuse me, I think I'm in the wrong place. Is this a repair shop?",
        "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 제가 잘못 온 것 같아요. 여기가 수리점인가요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "對，這裡是修理店。你需要幫忙嗎？",
        "pinyin": "Duì, zhèlǐ shì xiūlǐ diàn. Nǐ xūyào bāngmáng ma?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, zhe4 li3 shi4 xiu1 li3 dian4. Ni3 xu1 yao4 bang1 mang2 ma?",
        "translation_en": "Yes, this is a repair shop. Do you need help?",
        "translation_ko": "네, 여기가 수리점입니다. 도움이 필요하신가요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "我的手機壞了，可以幫我看看嗎？",
        "pinyin": "Wǒ de shǒujī huài le, kěyǐ bāng wǒ kànkan ma?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 de5 shou3 ji1 huai4 le5, ke3 yi3 bang1 wo3 kan4 kan5 ma?",
        "translation_en": "My phone is broken, can you take a look for me?",
        "translation_ko": "제 휴대폰이 고장 났는데, 좀 봐 주시겠어요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "沒問題。我先檢查一下。",
        "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Wǒ xiān jiǎnchá yīxià.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 wen4 ti2. Wo3 xian1 jian3 cha2 yi1 xia4.",
        "translation_en": "No problem. Let me check it first.",
        "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 먼저 확인해 볼게요."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "修理要多少錢？",
        "pinyin": "Xiūlǐ yào duōshao qián?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "xiu1 li3 yao4 duo1 shao5 qian2?",
        "translation_en": "How much will the repair cost?",
        "translation_ko": "수리 비용은 얼마인가요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "大概三百塊。算你便宜一點，兩百五就好。",
        "pinyin": "Dàgài sān bǎi kuài. Suàn nǐ piányi yīdiǎn, liǎng bǎi wǔ jiù hǎo.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "da4 gai4 san1 bai3 kuai4. Suan4 ni3 pian2 yi5 yi1 dian3, liang3 bai3 wu3 jiu4 hao3.",
        "translation_en": "About 300 dollars. I'll give you a discount, 250 is fine.",
        "translation_ko": "대략 300원입니다. 조금 깎아 드려서 250원이면 됩니다."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "好，謝謝你。這是兩百五。",
        "pinyin": "Hǎo, xièxie nǐ. Zhè shì liǎng bǎi wǔ.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, xie4 xie5 ni3. Zhe4 shi4 liang3 bai3 wu3.",
        "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. Here's 250.",
        "translation_ko": "좋아요, 감사합니다. 여기 250원입니다."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "不客氣。下次有問題再來找我。",
        "pinyin": "Bù kèqì. Xià cì yǒu wèntí zài lái zhǎo wǒ.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 ke4 qi4. Xia4 ci4 you3 wen4 ti2 zai4 lai2 zhao3 wo3.",
        "translation_en": "You're welcome. Come find me next time if you have any issues.",
        "translation_ko": "천만에요. 다음에 문제가 있으면 또 오세요."
      }
    ],
    "comprehension_questions": [
      {
        "question_en": "How much did the customer pay for the repair?",
        "question_ko": "손님은 수리비로 얼마를 지불했습니까?",
        "options_en": ["300 dollars", "250 dollars", "200 dollars"],
        "options_ko": ["300원", "250원", "200원"],
        "correct_index": 1
      }
    ],
    "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
    "free_response_prompt": "Describe a time you went to a repair shop and what you said."
  },
  {
    "title": "問路、買東西、聊天",
    "turns": [
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "請問，便利商店怎麼走？",
        "pinyin": "Qǐngwèn, biànlì shāngdiàn zěnme zǒu?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "qing3 wen4, bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 zen3 me zou3?",
        "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get to the convenience store?",
        "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 편의점은 어떻게 가나요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "一直走，到路口右轉，便利商店在左邊。",
        "pinyin": "Yīzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, biànlì shāngdiàn zài zuǒbiān.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "yi1 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4 kou3 you4 zhuan3, bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 zai4 zuo3 bian1.",
        "translation_en": "Go straight, turn right at the intersection, and the convenience store is on the left.",
        "translation_ko": "계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 우회전하시면, 편의점이 왼쪽에 있습니다."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "謝謝。我想買一個三明治和一杯豆漿，多少錢？",
        "pinyin": "Xièxie. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī gè sānmíngzhì hé yī bēi dòujiāng, duōshao qián?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie5. Wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi1 ge4 san1 ming2 zhi4 he2 yi1 bei1 dou4 jiang1, duo1 shao5 qian2?",
        "translation_en": "Thank you. I'd like to buy a sandwich and a cup of soy milk, how much is it?",
        "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 샌드위치 하나와 두유 한 잔을 사고 싶은데, 얼마인가요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "三明治三十五塊，豆漿二十塊，總共五十五塊。",
        "pinyin": "Sānmíngzhì sānshíwǔ kuài, dòujiāng èrshí kuài, zǒnggòng wǔshíwǔ kuài.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "san1 ming2 zhi4 san1 shi2 wu3 kuai4, dou4 jiang1 er4 shi2 kuai4, zong3 gong4 wu3 shi2 wu3 kuai4.",
        "translation_en": "The sandwich is 35 dollars, the soy milk is 20 dollars, total 55 dollars.",
        "translation_ko": "샌드위치는 35원, 두유는 20원, 총 55원입니다."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "這是六十塊，找我五塊就好。",
        "pinyin": "Zhè shì liùshí kuài, zhǎo wǒ wǔ kuài jiù hǎo.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "zhe4 shi4 liu4 shi2 kuai4, zhao3 wo3 wu3 kuai4 jiu4 hao3.",
        "translation_en": "Here's 60 dollars, just give me 5 dollars change.",
        "translation_ko": "여기 60원입니다, 5원만 거슬러 주세요."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "好的。你住在附近嗎？",
        "pinyin": "Hǎo de. Nǐ zhù zài fùjìn ma?",
        "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5. Ni3 zhu4 zai4 fu4 jin4 ma?",
        "translation_en": "Okay. Do you live nearby?",
        "translation_ko": "네. 근처에 사시나요?"
      },
      {
        "speaker": "A",
        "text": "對，我住在這附近。我想認識新朋友。",
        "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ zhù zài zhè fùjìn. Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 zhu4 zai4 zhe4 fu4 jin4. Wo3 xiang3 ren4 shi5 xin1 peng2 you5.",
        "translation_en": "Yes, I live near here. I'd like to make new friends.",
        "translation_ko": "네, 이 근처에 살아요. 새로운 친구를 사귀고 싶어요."
      },
      {
        "speaker": "B",
        "text": "太好了！我們可以一起聊天。",
        "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le! Wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ liáotiān.",
        "pinyin_numeric": "tai4 hao3 le5! Wo3 men5 ke3 yi3 yi1 qi3 liao2 tian1.",
        "translation_en": "Great! We can chat together.",
        "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요! 같이 이야기할 수 있어요."
      }
    ],
    "comprehension_questions": [
      {
        "question_en": "What did the customer buy?",
        "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 샀습니까?",
        "options_en": ["A sandwich and coffee", "A sandwich and soy milk", "A sandwich and water"],
        "options_ko": ["샌드위치와 커피", "샌드위치와 두유", "샌드위치와 물"],
        "correct_index": 1
      }
    ],
    "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
    "free_response_prompt": "Describe how you would ask for directions to a convenience store and buy something."
  }
]
